description: Refactored scratchpad functions (`scratchpad_write`, `scratchpad_read`, `scratchpad_clear`) to use a persistent `scratchpad.json` file for storing data, ensuring data persistence across cycles.
diff_summary: Modified scratchpad functions to use `memory/sessions/scratchpad.json` for storage instead of an in-memory dictionary. Introduced `_load_scratchpad` and `_save_scratchpad` helper functions.

hypothesis.rationale: To improve the 'reasoning_architecture' score, I will enhance the 'reflection' skill by refining its ability to identify and formulate more impactful improvement hypotheses. This should lead to more effective evolution cycles.
hypothesis.expected_improvement: An increase in the 'reasoning_architecture' score, indicating better problem decomposition and strategic planning.
